behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all file paths (utils.ts, +page.svelte, ComponentEntry.svelte, guide md), function signatures (needs_iframe, build_srcdoc, clickOutside), required literals ('Click Me', 'dark' class, '<\/script' escape, 'huggingface-cli login', 'push_to_hub', 'head' parameter).

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes requirements and signatures but doesn't prescribe exact implementation lines; the agent must design the template substitution and iframe wiring.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavioral outputs (HTML contains doctype, dark class, chartreuse CSS, escaped </script) rather than internal variable names; alternative correct implementations would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute the utils.ts code via Node with --experimental-strip-types and call needs_iframe/build_srcdoc with assertions on return values.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests check bidirectional behavior (true vs false cases for needs_iframe), verify prop substitution across different inputs, and check multiple HTML structure markers — stubs returning defaults would fail.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover needs_iframe detection, build_srcdoc structure/dark mode/script escaping/head+CSS, clickOutside preservation, and (truncated but implied) guide documentation.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with header comments (Gates, Fail-to-pass needs_iframe, build_srcdoc, Pass-to-pass) and tagged [pr_diff]/[static].

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces HTML/Svelte code, not structured data API output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and function names are consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files to look at (appropriate since task describes a gallery bug) but doesn't specify line numbers.
